author: James Clear
_note: Stub fixture for offline testing. image_url uses Lorem Picsum so the renderer can run without a Gemini key. The real LLM-generated JSON has image_prompt instead.

slides.headline: You don't rise to your goals. You fall to your systems.
slides.voiceover: You don't rise to your goals. You fall to your systems.

slides.headline: 1% better daily = 37x in a year
slides.voiceover: Tiny habits compound. One percent better daily equals thirty-seven times in a year.

slides.headline: Don't chase outcomes. Chase who you become.
slides.voiceover: Habits stack into identity. Don't chase outcomes - chase who you become.

slides.headline: Make it obvious. Easy. Attractive. Satisfying.
slides.voiceover: Make it obvious. Make it easy. Make it satisfying. Four laws.

slides.headline: Willpower fails. Environment wins.
slides.voiceover: Environment beats willpower. Design the room, not the discipline.

slides.headline: Break the cue. Break the loop.
slides.voiceover: Bad habits trap you in loops. Break the cue, break the cycle.

slides.headline: Read the book that rewires how you build everything.
slides.voiceover: Read Atomic Habits. It will change how you build everything.
